# .github/file-size-ceilings.txt — BUG-528 LOC ratchet
#
# Format: <path>=<ceiling> (one per line; # for comments).
#
# Each path is grandfathered at the LOC value captured at this commit
# (2026-04-25, BUG-528 implementation). Guard: scripts/guards/check-file-size.ts
#
#   current > ceiling + 50  → CI FAIL (LOC ratchet violation; split or refactor)
#   current < ceiling - 200 → CI emits NOTICE; manually edit this file
#                              to lock in the lower ceiling.
#
# Files NOT in this list:
#   <= 1000 LOC → no constraint
#   >  1000 LOC → CI FAIL (architectural BLOCK threshold; split, OR
#                 add to this file with BUG-cite if grandfathering).
#
# To add a new entry mid-feature: include the line in the same PR
# that creates the file, with a BUG-ID comment justifying the size.
#
# Closes god-file growth class (BUG-420 / BUG-524). The ratchet runs
# NOW; the actual MedicationsTab split is BUG-524's job.
#
# 47 entries grandfathered at BUG-528 introduction.

# ── apps/api/src ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
apps/api/src/features/appointments/appointmentService.ts=687
apps/api/src/features/llm/llmRoutes.ts=1037
apps/api/src/features/llm/scribeRoutes.ts=363

# expanded two-way exchange + digital care routes; split into bounded
# route modules is tracked as a follow-up architecture slice.
# 2026-05-31 bump: activation hardening + wearable/digital care route wiring
# landed in same file; keep ratchet strict on future growth.
apps/api/src/features/patient-app/patientAppRoutes.internal.ts=2263

# related safety wiring increased patientRoutes LOC in this release.

# grandfather) to 665 LOC. Under the 1000-LOC architectural BLOCK
# threshold. Ceiling auto-drop NOTICE fires per BUG-528.
